title: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference with `JSON_EXTRACT`
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS db0;
CREATE DATABASE db0;
USE db0;

CREATE  TABLE  t0(c0 INT); 
CREATE VIEW v0(c0, c1, c2) AS SELECT 2023, NULL, 2.718 FROM t0;


SELECT * FROM v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((1 % v0.c1) IN (JSON_EXTRACT('a', '')<=>(v0.c2='f'), v0.c1)) IS NULL;
-- ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

No runtime error.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

server log:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR, c2 VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, '{"key": "value"}', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c0, c1 AS extracted_key, c2 FROM t1;
SELECT * FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON v1.c0 = t1.c0 WHERE (c1 IS NULL) OR (c2 = 'default');
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with JSON_EXTRACT causing runtime error
